mapper.sql: id, fund_code, fund_name, fund_type, pinyin_abbr, pinyin_full, buy_status, daily_purchase_limit, return_coverage_status, returns_as_of, unit_nav, accumulated_nav, daily_growth_rate, top_holdings_as_of, public_holdings_status, one_month_return, three_months_return, six_months_return, one_year_return, three_years_return, catalog_fetched_at, purchase_status_fetched_at, period_return_fetched_at, top_holding_fetched_at, last_detail_view_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fund (fund_code, fund_name, fund_type, pinyin_abbr, pinyin_full, catalog_fetched_at) VALUES (#{fundCode}, #{fundName}, #{fundType}, #{pinyinAbbr}, #{pinyinFull}, #{catalogFetchedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), fund_name = VALUES(fund_name), fund_type = VALUES(fund_type), pinyin_abbr = VALUES(pinyin_abbr), pinyin_full = VALUES(pinyin_full), catalog_fetched_at = VALUES(catalog_fetched_at), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO fund (fund_code, fund_name, fund_type, pinyin_abbr, pinyin_full, catalog_fetched_at) VALUES
(#{fund.fundCode}, #{fund.fundName}, #{fund.fundType}, #{fund.pinyinAbbr}, #{fund.pinyinFull}, #{fund.catalogFetchedAt})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), fund_name = VALUES(fund_name), fund_type = VALUES(fund_type), pinyin_abbr = VALUES(pinyin_abbr), pinyin_full = VALUES(pinyin_full), catalog_fetched_at = VALUES(catalog_fetched_at), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE fund SET buy_status = #{buyStatus}, daily_purchase_limit = #{dailyPurchaseLimit}, purchase_status_fetched_at = #{purchaseStatusFetchedAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE fund_code = #{fundCode}

UPDATE fund SET return_coverage_status = #{returnCoverageStatus}, returns_as_of = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{returnsAsOf} ELSE returns_as_of END, unit_nav = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{unitNav} ELSE unit_nav END, accumulated_nav = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{accumulatedNav} ELSE accumulated_nav END, daily_growth_rate = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{dailyGrowthRate} ELSE daily_growth_rate END, one_month_return = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{oneMonthReturn} ELSE one_month_return END, three_months_return = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{threeMonthsReturn} ELSE three_months_return END, six_months_return = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{sixMonthsReturn} ELSE six_months_return END, one_year_return = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{oneYearReturn} ELSE one_year_return END, three_years_return = CASE WHEN #{returnCoverageStatus} = 'covered' THEN #{threeYearsReturn} ELSE three_years_return END, period_return_fetched_at = #{periodReturnFetchedAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE fund_code = #{fundCode}

UPDATE fund SET top_holdings_as_of = #{topHoldingsAsOf}, public_holdings_status = #{publicHoldingsStatus}, top_holding_fetched_at = #{topHoldingFetchedAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE fund_code = #{fundCode}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT targets.fund_code FROM ( SELECT ai.asset_code AS fund_code FROM asset_info ai WHERE ai.asset_kind = 'fund' AND ai.status = 'enabled' AND ai.asset_code IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT ai.asset_code AS fund_code FROM asset_holding ah INNER JOIN asset_info ai ON ai.id = ah.asset_id WHERE ah.status = 'active' AND ai.asset_kind = 'fund' AND ai.status = 'enabled' UNION SELECT f.fund_code FROM fund f WHERE f.last_detail_view_time >= #{viewedSince} ) targets INNER JOIN fund f ON f.fund_code = targets.fund_code ORDER BY targets.fund_code
